ddls:
CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of domain (e.g., whitelist, blacklist) */,
  "domain" TEXT /* The domain URL */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the domain is enabled or not */,
  "date_added" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp when the domain was added */,
  "date_modified" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp when the domain was last modified */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment explaining the reason for the domain's addition or modification */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address associated with the domain */,
  "is_dynamic" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the domain uses a dynamic IP address */,
  "last_ip_change" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp to track the last IP address change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the domain */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES domain_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domain_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the domain type is a default type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp for the last login time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain affected by the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., add, modify, delete) */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp when the change was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment explaining the reason for the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string to identify the client software used */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_action FOREIGN KEY ("action") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domain_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain */,
  "date_modified" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp when the change was made */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the domain was enabled or not at the time of the change */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment explaining the reason for the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the history entry */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_history_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_history_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store role-specific permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "is_reversible" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the action can be reversed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)
